name: Inquiro RNA SDK
postCreateCommand: cd mock && uv venv && uv pip install -r requirements.txt && echo '=== Dependencies installed ==='
postStartCommand: bash -c 'cd mock && uv run python mock_server.py &>/tmp/mock.log & sleep 3 && echo "=== Smoke test: tools/list ===" && curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/mcp -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"jsonrpc\":\"2.0\",\"id\":\"1\",\"method\":\"tools/list\",\"params\":{}}" | python -m json.tool && echo "" && echo "=== Mock server ready at http://localhost:8000/mcp ===" && echo "=== Live API at https://aiflightrecorder.onrender.com/mcp ===" && echo "" && echo "=== Quick start: run examples/curl/02-submit-attestation.sh ==="'

8000.label: Mock MCP Server
8000.postCreateCommand: python3 -m pip install --user 'uv' && export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && cd ${containerWorkspaceFolder}/mock && uv venv && uv pip install -r requirements.txt
8000.postStartCommand: export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && cd ${containerWorkspaceFolder}/mock && nohup uv run python mock_server.py > /tmp/mock_rna.log 2>&1 & sleep 3 && echo '=== Testing mock server ===' && curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/mcp -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":"1","method":"tools/list","params":{}}' | python3 -m json.tool && echo '' && echo '=== Mock server ready. Endpoint: http://localhost:8000/mcp ===' && echo '=== Live endpoint: https://aiflightrecorder.onrender.com/mcp ==='
